title: Unique Party 55523 - 18" Foil Prism Mr and Mrs Wedding Balloon
features: 1 Foil Prism Mr and Mrs Wedding Balloon
Round Foil Balloon measures 18" (46cm) when fully inflated with helium (ships uninflated)
Featuring linked white hearts and "Mr & Mrs" text, this shimmering foil balloon is ideal for a wedding or anniversary party
Combine with latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a balloon bouquet or table decoration
Coordinate with other wedding decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Bring charming style to a wedding celebration with this Foil Prism Mr and Mrs Wedding Balloon. Featuring linked white hearts and "Mr & Mrs" text, this shimmering foil balloon would be a charming addition to a wedding or anniversary party. Tie it indoors to a chair for a quick and easy stand-alone decoration, or outside your house or venue to help guests locate the party. This foil balloon would also look great combined with assorted latex balloons, curling ribbon and a balloon weight as part of a festive balloon bouquet or table centrepiece. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1 x 18" PKG MR & MRS PRISM BLLN See more
